AC: 10
STR: +3 WIS: +3
WT: 0.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Slot: CHEST
AC: 10
STR: +3 WIS: +3
WT: 0.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC

Uber loot for level 25 mob, i am going to attempt this tonight with Fot7 and KEI

I need
QuoteReply
# May 02 2003 at 3:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254668377
16 posts
I think this would rock my monk's world. A lot better than raw sild and the stats are awesome. 10 ac and no wieght. If anyone selling on Fennin Ro, give Bustii a tell. =)
▲ Page top
nice pickup
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2002 at 3:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777088096
40 posts
Oh what a luck(again).
I walked around in Highkeep to buy some songs for a friend of mine and found this tunic at the erudin enchanter merchant there. I bought it for 3pp! So another 3 wisdom added. Had to bank my BCP because I dont really need it anymore, was good to bring me to 31 tho.
▲ Page top
Cheap
QuoteReply
# May 10 2002 at 6:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778824420
292 posts
Bought this in Oasis for my druid for 60pp...the guy was either real nice or real stupid hehe. I made almost have the money back buy selling my Lockjaw hide tunic for 25pp =P Anyways this is a nice low-mid level item for a druid.
▲ Page top
Good Tunic
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2002 at 10:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760347363
46 posts
Good tunic, good price, and maybe it only looks like leather but it doesn't bother me.
▲ Page top
Got my Tunic!
QuoteReply
# Jan 03 2002 at 6:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770176339
View User Forum
71 posts
Solusek Eye is just too rough for me so I opted to purchase this fine item. Although I wished it looked different that the other leather-like items (post Luclin). A gal's gotta change her outfits now and then. Very nice stats for now. Hoping to upgrade to Shroud of nature...but that's not till sometime yet. Until then, I am happy with this item.
▲ Page top
Foremnan's or Executioners?
QuoteReply
# Jun 16 2001 at 7:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757246689
2 posts
Was wondering, as a monk, I wear a wus fighting shirt, I recently bought a fighting baton for my Essense of Dol and an orc fang earring. Should i now try to buy one of these, an executioners hood (I have no head item) or rebuy my orc fang earring? Or maybe even something else?
▲ Page top
RE: Foremnan's or Executioners?
QuoteReply
# Sep 07 2002 at 7:44 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254640166
9 posts
Forman's tunic weight is 0.0 , Crystal Covered Shroud is weight 1.0 . This may make a difference if your a monk.
▲ Page top
RE: Foremnan's or Executioners?
QuoteReply
# Sep 06 2001 at 8:28 AM Rating: Default
Sigoniax
View User Forum
154 posts
Here's what I would do...forget the Foreman's Tunic..go and buy a Crystal Covered Shroud for like 200pp...It's 12 AC 4 wis 4 int 4 agi...not bad for monks...
____________________________
Sigoniax Eve
80 Paladin
Erollisi Marr

*The beginning of the end or the end of the beginning..Choose your path*
▲ Page top
RE: Foremnan's or Executioners?
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2001 at 1:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
I guess you can make arguments for either. This is almost a tie with a wu's shirt, considering that the wu's agility boost gives them both about the same AC. But this gives you a little strength, which means better attacks, and a bit of wisdom, which will help you learn skills faster. That makes the foreman's tunic better in my opinion, but only marginally. If you already have a wu shirt, I wouldn't bother replacing it, but if all you have is cured silk or worse, this makes a nice piece of monk armor.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 15 2001 at 1:00 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I'm a level 35 Druid and I took the level to go for Wisdom Item hunting. This was my second item on list to get, because I didn't have anything giving me wisdom on my chest.
RE: Long camp, lost of time
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2001 at 8:42 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755359730
Scholar
60 posts
To bad you were unlucky my druid alt's mid to high 20's group camped this room and got good exp, two tunics and two pair of kobold hide boots in a couple hours.

Someone level 35 should be getting a full group and going to Droga to get a shroud of nature anyway which drops pretty quickly if you kill all the gobs in the area fast.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 19 2001 at 8:42 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You petetioned the GM to whine that the mob wasnt spawning fast enough? What a friggin' wuss. Bwahahahahaa. Loser.......
#Anonymous, Posted: Dec 06 2000 at 2:46 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) That is wrong it drops in Solusek A not Soluseks eye

QuoteReply
# May 27 2001 at 11:05 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
SolA and Solusks eye are the same place, SolA is just a popular nickname
▲ Page top
RE: Drop
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2001 at 2:45 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Actually about 3 years ago, when eq had just been officially launched, this zone used to be called SolA. After a while (and several patches later) the zone name was changed to Soluseks Eye.
Just a little history.
▲ Page top
RE: Drop
QuoteReply

__DEL__1592248115978
10 posts
Actually when eq had been officially launched, this zone did not exist, hehe, it was added later, just a little more history
